reference: I have congestion in my head and chest. During a very severe coughing episode, I experienced a certain pain in my upper left abdomen. Now the pain is so bad that I cannot allow myself to cough unless I have a pillow pressed against the pain spot. Can coughing cause such pain? I thought maybe I had strained a muscle, but there is a little swelling.
text: I have congestion in my head and chest. During a very severe coughing episode, I experienced a certain pain in my upper left abdomen. Now the pain is so bad that I cannot allow myself to cough unless I have a pillow pressed against the pain spot. Can coughing cause such pain? I thought maybe I had strained a muscle, but there is a little swelling.
